data.content: Plan review approved: the proposed root cause matches the current beats layout, where both the shared header and page body are centered with max-w-[95vw] and would shift when the body scrollbar disappears. Adding scrollbar-gutter: stable to the existing html rule in src/app/globals.css is a minimal, maintainable fix that addresses ReTakes and Diagnostics without component churn. The manual test strategy covers the stated acceptance criteria and regression surface.
